name: convertGPSTimestamp
title: convertGPSTimestamp
syntax: void convertGPSTimestamp(dword timestamp, dword& year, byte& month, byte & day, byte & hour, byte & minute, byte & second);
description: Converts a GPS time stamp into UTC based date and time information.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Receives the year of the time stamp.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Receives the month of the time stamp (between 1 and 12).

parameters.name: day
parameters.description: Receives the day of the time stamp (between 1 and 31).

parameters.name: hour
parameters.description: Receives the hour of the time stamp (between 0 and 23).

parameters.name: minute
parameters.description: Receives the minute of the time stamp (between 0 and 59).

parameters.name: second
parameters.description: Receives the second of the time stamp (between 0 and 59).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
